name: Supercell
flavorHeadline: Ghost pepper + red fresno blend, black garlic umami depth
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Supercell EF-4 hot sauce with a dark crimson label
productStory: A supercell doesn't sneak up on you. You watch it form, you feel the pressure change, and when it arrives, it has your full attention. Ghost pepper brings the rotation. Black garlic adds the kind of deep, savory undertow that keeps you coming back even when your better judgment says stop.
pairings: Slow-smoked ribs with a dry rub
Dark chocolate and aged cheddar board
